title: paspalum lanciflorum
intro: Paspalum lanciflorum, also known as the narrow leaved paspalum, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is known to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it beneficial for various health issues such as reducing fever and improving digestion. The leaves and stems of the paspalum lanciflorum can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, or dried and used as a powder in herbal remedies.
